response.justification: Bogdan possesses exceptional experience in geospatial data processing and building event-driven geo-data platforms, which is a direct and strong match for the industry and core responsibilities of this role. His background in distributed systems, low-latency applications, and strong software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD) further align him well with the job's technical demands. While his recent experience isn't primarily in modern C++ or Rust, his demonstrated ability and willingness to quickly adopt new technologies and work across the full stack suggest he could rapidly become proficient in the required languages.
strengths: Exceptional geospatial data platform and processing experience.
Proven ability to build scalable, high-performance, and reliable distributed systems.
Strong software engineering fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD) and adaptability to new technologies.
concerns: Limited recent experience with modern C++ development; primary C++ experience is older.
No explicit mention of Rust experience, which is an acceptable alternative.
Primary language focus in recent roles has been Node.js/TypeScript/Dlang, not C++ or Rust.
